74050.subject: 📉 Historic market collapse
74050.body:
Today’s newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick O’Neill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger you’ll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure you’re subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

———————————————————————————

## Top Stories

**BTC** $X(+X%) | **ETH** $X (+X%) | **SOL** $X (-X%)

* The crypto market collapses as Fear and Greed drops to [19 (Extreme Fear)](https://coinmarketcap.com/charts/fear-and-greed-index/) and Bitcoin falls[ below $62K](https://coinmarketcap.com/currencies/bitcoin/) — Mt Gox [deposits $8M](https://x.com/lookonchain/status/2062349019318489105?s=20) BTC to Bitstamp

* Over [$1.7B gets liquidated](https://x.com/solidintel_x/status/2062486771900756054?s=20) from the crypto market over the last 24 hours

* Nasdaq futures [fall over 1%](https://x.com/DeItaone/status/2062505268856930599?s=20)

* MSTR is [down 18%](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/MSTR/) on the week as STRC falls [below $95](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/STRC/) — Strategy is now facing its [largest unrealized loss in history](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2062475802252365980?s=20)

* Bitmine’s unrealized [ETH losses](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2061957912642060412?s=20) balloon to $8.8B — Files for [preferred stock offering](https://x.com/zoomerfied/status/2062288919853490553?s=20) that will yield 9.5% APY

* [HYPE flips SOL](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2062230370930622650?s=20) in price

* Broadcom [drops 16%](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2062503375862739120?s=20) on the day, erasing $350B of value

* SpaceX releases[ $75B IPO target ](https://x.com/DeItaone/status/2062499371460034996?s=20)with 555M shares available at an offering price of $135

* US home sellers are [pulling houses off the market](https://x.com/Barchart/status/2062393922358301041?s=20) at rates not seen since Covid

* Moonpay releases [MoonAgents](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2062161530372726961?s=20) desktop app

* Anthropic picks Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley to [lead IPO](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2062296014879383922?s=20)

* Google releases [Gemma 4](https://x.com/tokens/status/2062250473131045158?s=20) opensource AI model

* HYPE and NEAR shed gains as Arthur Hayes [sells his positions](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2062446445652009050?s=20)

* Robinhood launches support for AI agents to [use Robinhood Gold Card](https://x.com/tokens/status/2062496713219411987?s=20)

———————————————————————————


———

Y

Fear and Greed sits at 

 Extreme Fear
and BTC is near
$62K
this morning, down from $70,000 earlier this week. BTC found a
partial floor overnight after the US Treasury Secretary told the
Senate the government is actively building a strategic Bitcoin
reserve.

The week's selling has been severe. But the policy signals
coming out of Washington are the most constructive in years. A
rare physical Bitcoin just moved after fifteen years. And Zcash
quietly fixed a critical bug while its price kept climbing.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

Citi Says Bitcoin's Demand Problem Is Bigger Than One Sale

Citi says Bitcoin's decline is driven by weak investor
demand, not Strategy's small Bitcoin sale. ETF flows explain
roughly 45% of weekly Bitcoin return variation, the bank
estimates.

The current outflow streak is the longest since spot Bitcoin
ETFs launched in 2024. Without CLARITY Act progress, Citi warns
sentiment may stay muted.

What does Citi say could bring fresh demand back into Bitcoin?

Read More  
( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/02eJ-C3R90Mf30-A680GIA~~/AAQRxRA~/X680afWFfixS-Jg6EAnp18vqdMGm3Ktut79Hy5WsEVyZur-qRDjA9MG9AhY8Bep371GKVJjmx3Eyg0jAOIQUanUILvjI99L7hwX1rodWxk_vJ0eNIuYSthapo7mO2OClNB6ydzsmoJngWfyBC84Tpe--yLMsRB3cqrixZhcryjdRMdDmsEZVnACY0N5Fs0bWl8oNaBJJvRLUujoaXqxM9g~~ )
   A Physical Bitcoin From 2011 Just Got Redeemed

74044.subject: PFI Monthly - May Edition
74044.body:
PFI Monthly 

Автор: Prague Finance Institute


Автор: Prague Finance Institute

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/pfi-monthly-may-edition-prague-finance-institute-6lqvf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BD61o8EPuTCqqxsY8x9mV%2Fg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3j3tL4gM2iQIg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mpzdu0ez~g7-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mpzdu0ez-g7
  
Dear professionals, welcome to the new edition of our PFI newsletter. In the March issue, we have prepared for you: PFI Monthly research report PFI Roundtable PFI Talks PFI Monthly In this edition, we cover topics from financial markets, macroeconomics, corporate finance, private equity, banking, behavioral finance, and the Czech M&A market. The May edition also includes our interview of the month with Tomáš Pfeiler, CFA, discussing the current AI-driven market environment, equity valuations, interest rates, government bonds, private credit, and broader risks across global financial markets. In this edition: Interview of the month – Tomáš Pfeiler, CFA: AI euphoria is the prevailing market narrative once again Trade-weighted real effective exchange rate (REER) as an essential analytical concept for every economist Simple, not easy: Every stock return has just two moving parts The return of the discount rate Equity investing 101 – Investors have to distinguish between business performance and market pricing Efficient market hypothesis (EMH) and expectations investing Capital allocation – The CEO’s most important job Seyfor enters CRM with 40% stake in Raynet at close to CZK 1bn valuation Private equity plays the long game Private equity is financing liquidity What covered bond pricing reveals about the Czech market Prospect theory – The intellectual foundation of behavioral finance Book review of the month – Mastering the Market Cycle: Getting the Odds on Your Side by Howard Marks 👉 Read the full edition to explore all insights in detail. PFI ROUNDTABLE | The ideal EXIT through the eyes of legal advisors and private equity investors What does a successful investment exit look like from the perspective of investors and legal advisors? And what is everything that goes into successfully completing a transaction? At the next PFI Roundtable meeting, we will open one of the key topics in the world of private equity and M&A – the ideal EXIT. Insights from major transactions and investments will be shared by leading experts from practice: ◾️ Jana Chwaszcz, Local Partner, White & Case LLP ◾️ Petr Rieger, Director, The Carlyle Group ◾️ Jan Černý, Managing Partner, Pale Fire Capital Moderator: Petr Skocdopole After the discussion, there will be informal networking. 📍Wednesday, June 10, 2026 I 18:00 Zenwork Palác ARA Registration here! C
